ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Cooking time in minutes */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who submitted the recipe */,
  "submitted" TEXT /* Date the recipe was submitted */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the recipe (e.g., '60-minutes-or-less', 'time-to-make', 'course') */,
  "nutrition" REAL /* Nutritional information (e.g., calories, fat, sugar, sodium, protein, saturated fat, carbohydrates) */,
  "n_steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps in the recipe */,
  "steps" TEXT /* Step-by-step cooking instructions */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recipe */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* Ingredients required for the recipe */,
  "n_ingredients" INTEGER /* Number of ingredients required */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "servings" INTEGER /* Number of servings the recipe yields */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image for the recipe */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video for the recipe */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recipe (e.g., website, book, magazine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the contributor */,
  "website" TEXT /* The URL of the contributor's website or blog */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the contributor's social media profiles */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date the contributor joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* The URL of the user's website or blog */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the review has been marked as helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the review has been marked as unhelpful */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image uploaded with the review */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video uploaded with the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe associated with the nutritional information */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories per serving */,
  "total_fat" REAL /* Total fat per serving */,
  "sugar" REAL /* Sugar per serving */,
  "sodium" REAL /* Sodium per serving */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein per serving */,
  "sat_fat" REAL /* Saturated fat per serving */,
  "carbs" REAL /* Carbohydrates per serving */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Fiber content per serving */,
  "cholesterol" REAL /* Cholesterol content per serving */,
  "vitamins" TEXT /* A list of vitamins and their content per serving */,
  "minerals" TEXT /* A list of minerals and their content per serving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe associated with the ingredient */,
  "ingredient" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the ingredient required */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe associated with the tag */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., cuisine, diet, occasion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe associated with the step */,
  "step" TEXT /* Text of the step */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time in minutes required for the step */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image for the step */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_steps_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the profile */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Text of the user profile */,
  "location" TEXT /* The user's location */,
  "favorite_cuisine" TEXT /* The user's favorite cuisine */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any food allergies the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributor_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor profile */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor associated with the profile */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Text of the contributor profile */,
  "location" TEXT /* The contributor's location */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* The contributor's specialties (e.g., baking, grilling, vegan cooking) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards or recognitions the contributor has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributor_profiles_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_tags" (
  "recipe_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe-tag association */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_tags_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_ingredients" (
  "recipe_ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe-ingredient association */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe associated with the ingredient */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient associated with the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ingredients_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)
